body:
Hey %contact_first_name%,

Las Vegas inventory looks a lot different than it did a few months ago.
Some neighborhoods are seeing fresh listings and new price drops.

Check out what’s available now:
👉 [%custom_ylopo_listing_alert%]

If you’re still in the market, I can send you the best options today.
subject: Re: The market’s changed —the time is now see what’s new, %contact_first_name%
